name: Tripeptide-1
rationale: Small repair-oriented signal peptide commonly used as a cosmetic reference.
evidence_summary: GHK and related copper-peptide systems are repeatedly discussed as repair and remodeling motifs in topical peptide reviews.
evidence_caveats: Most topical evidence is review-level rather than large controlled clinical datasets.

citations.title: Peptide peptides and skin: A review of their chemistry and clinical applications
Peptides and proteins in skin care
citations.journal: Facial Plast Surg Clin North Am

name: Copper Tripeptide-1
rationale: Repair-focused copper-peptide neighborhood for barrier and remodeling claims.
evidence_summary: Copper tripeptide systems are repeatedly cited for wound-healing and remodeling contexts, with cosmetic translation discussed in reviews.
evidence_caveats: Clinical anti-wrinkle evidence is weaker than the mechanistic wound-repair literature.

citations.title: Peptide peptides and skin: A review of their chemistry and clinical applications

name: Palmitoyl Tripeptide-1
rationale: Lipidated signal-peptide motif often used for collagen-support positioning.
evidence_summary: Palmitoylated signal peptides are described in cosmetic reviews as ECM-support motifs that improve delivery and product compatibility.
evidence_caveats: Evidence is stronger at the family level than for palmitoyl tripeptide-1 alone.

citations.title: Signal Peptides: Promising Ingredients in Cosmetics
Peptides and proteins in skin care
citations.journal: Facial Plast Surg Clin North Am

name: Palmitoyl Pentapeptide-4
rationale: Canonical signal-peptide benchmark for wrinkle-softening and firmness claims.
evidence_summary: Pal-KTTKS has one of the cleaner cosmetic evidence stories among signal peptides, including controlled topical anti-wrinkle data and repeated review coverage.
evidence_caveats: Study sizes remain small by pharmaceutical standards.

citations.title: Signal Peptides: Promising Ingredients in Cosmetics

name: Palmitoyl Tetrapeptide-7
rationale: Often grouped with repair and anti-inflammatory cosmetic peptide systems.
evidence_summary: Palmitoyl tetrapeptide-7 is usually discussed as part of anti-inflammatory and sensitive-skin peptide systems rather than as a stand-alone clinically mature ingredient.
evidence_caveats: Most accessible evidence is review-level and often bundled with other peptides.

citations.title: Signal Peptides: Promising Ingredients in Cosmetics
Active ingredients against human epidermal barrier impairment and sensitive skin

name: Acetyl Hexapeptide-8
rationale: Reference neuromodulatory cosmetic peptide for expression-line softening prompts.
evidence_summary: Argireline is one of the better documented neuromodulatory cosmetic peptides, with controlled topical data but still modest overall evidence depth.
evidence_caveats: Topical wrinkle changes are measurable but not equivalent to injectable neuromodulator outcomes.

citations.title: Anti-wrinkle effects of a topical applied acetyl hexapeptide-8 in Asian skin
Peptides and proteins in skin care
citations.journal: Facial Plast Surg Clin North Am

name: Acetyl Octapeptide-3
rationale: Extended Argireline-like motif used in wrinkle-softening product neighborhoods.
evidence_summary: SNAP-8 is mostly supported by derivative and category-level cosmetic peptide reviews rather than robust stand-alone clinical datasets.
evidence_caveats: Evidence is mostly extrapolated from the neuromodulatory cosmetic peptide family.
